Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine:
DVPXUTL ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Utility Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; %DT 10003 ; DIQ 2056 ; VASITE 10112 ; XLFDT 10103 ; XUAF4 2171 ; XUSTAX 4911 ; XLFCRC 3156 ; XLFUTL 2622 Q ; DATE(X) ; -- Return internal form of date X N %DT,Y S %DT="TX" D ^%DT Q Y ; FHIRDTTM(DTTM,RPC) I $G(RPC) Q $E(DTTM,1,4)_"-"_$E(DTTM,5,6)_"-"_$E(DTTM,7,8) N X S X=$$FMTE^XLFDT(DTTM,"7Z"),X=$TR($TR(X,"/","-"),"@","T") I $F(X,"T") D . I $L(X)=16 S X=X_":00" . N TZ S TZ=$$TZ^XLFDT . I $E(TZ,1,2)'="-" S TZ=$E(TZ,1,3)_":"_$E(TZ,4,5) . I $E(TZ,1,2)="00" S TZ="Z" . S X=X_TZ Q X
JSONDT(X) ; -- convert FileMan DT to HL7 DT for JSON N D,DATE,M,TIME,Y S DATE=$P($$FMTHL7^XLFDT(X),"-") I $L(DATE)>8 S TIME=$E(DATE,9,$L(DATE)) S Y=$E(DATE,1,4),M=$E(DATE,5,6),D=$E(DATE,7,8) K DATE S DATE=Y I M>0 S DATE=DATE_M S:D>0 DATE=DATE_D I $G(TIME)'="" S DATE=DATE_TIME Q DATE ; FACILITY(X,Y) ; -- add facility info to array for JSON ; X=STATION NUMBER^STATION NAME ; Y=Variable array name S @Y@("facilityCode")=$P(X,"^") S @Y@("facilityName")=$P(X,"^",2) Q ; FAC(X) ; -- return Institution file station# for location X N HLOC,FAC,Y0,Y S Y="" S HLOC=$G(^SC(+$G(X),0)),FAC=$P(HLOC,U,4) ; Get P:4 via Med Ctr Div, if not directly linked I 'FAC,$P(HLOC,U,15) S FAC=$$GET1^DIQ(44,+$G(X)_",","3.5:.07","I") S Y0=$S(FAC:$$NS^XUAF4(FAC),1:$P($$SITE^VASITE,U,2,3)) ;name^stn# S:$L(Y0) Y=$P(Y0,U,2)_U_$P(Y0,U) ;switch to stn#^name I $L(Y),'Y S $P(Y,U)=FAC Q Y ; VUID(IEN,FILE) ; -- Return VUID for item Q $$GET1^DIQ(FILE,IEN_",",99.99) ; SETVURN(DOMAIN,VALUE) ; -- create VA urn N RESULT S RESULT="" S RESULT="urn:va:"_DOMAIN_":"_VALUE Q RESULT ; SETUID(DOMAIN,PAT,ID,ADDDATA) ; -- create uid string N RESULT,SYS S RESULT="urn:va:"_DOMAIN_":"_$$SYS()_":"_$S($G(PAT):PAT_":",1:"")_ID I $L($G(ADDDATA)) S RESULT=RESULT_":"_ADDDATA Q RESULT ; SYS() ; -- return hashed system name ;Q $$BASE^XLFUTL($$CRC16^XLFCRC($$KSP^XUPARAM("WHERE")),10,16) Q $P($$SITE^VASITE,U,3) ; STRING(ARRAY) ; -- Return text in ARRAY(n) or ARRAY(n,0) as a string N I,X,Y S Y="" S I=+$O(ARRAY("")) I I=0 S I=+$O(ARRAY(0)) S Y=$S($D(ARRAY(I,0)):ARRAY(I,0),1:$G(ARRAY(I))) F S I=$O(ARRAY(I)) Q:I<1 D . S X=$S($D(ARRAY(I,0)):ARRAY(I,0),1:ARRAY(I)) . I $E(X)=" " S Y=Y_$C(13,10)_X Q . S Y=Y_$S($E(Y,$L(Y))=" ":"",1:" ")_X Q Y ; ADDRESS(RES,X) ; Return Address Specs ; Input: RES passed by reference will be returned with address data ; X = address data in format [use^type^st1^st2^st3^city^county^state^zip^country^period(start^end)] N ADDTEXT S ADDTEXT="" I $P(X,U,1)]"" S RES("use")=$P(X,U,1) ;home,work,temp,old I $P(X,U,2)]"" S RES("type")=$P(X,U,2) ;postal,physical I $P(X,U,3)]"" S ADDTEXT=$P(X,U,3) I $P(X,U,4)]"" S ADDTEXT=ADDTEXT_" "_$P(X,U,4) I $P(X,U,5)]"" S ADDTEXT=ADDTEXT_" "_$P(X,U,5) I $P(X,U,6)]"" S ADDTEXT=ADDTEXT_", "_$P(X,U,6) I $P(X,U,8)]"" S ADDTEXT=ADDTEXT_", "_$P(X,U,8) I $P(X,U,9)]"" S ADDTEXT=ADDTEXT_" "_$P(X,U,9) I ", "_$P(X,U,8)=ADDTEXT S ADDTEXT="" ;no text if only state is available I ADDTEXT]"" S RES("text")=ADDTEXT I $P(X,U,3)]"" S RES("line",1)=$P(X,U,3) ;line 1 I $P(X,U,4)]"" S RES("line",2)=$P(X,U,4) ;line 2 I $P(X,U,5)]"" S RES("line",3)=$P(X,U,5) ;line 3 I $P(X,U,6)]"" S RES("city")=$P(X,U,6) ;city I $P(X,U,7)]"" S RES("district")=$P(X,U,7) ;county I $P(X,U,8)]"" S RES("state")=$P(X,U,8) ;state I $P(X,U,9)]"" S RES("postalCode")=$P(X,U,9) ;zip code I $P(X,U,10)]"" S RES("country")=$P(X,U,10) ;country D PERIOD(.RES,$P(X,U,11)_U_$P(X,U,12)) I $D(RES("text"))=0,$D(RES("state"))=0 K RES ; kill ret var if only type is populated Q ; TELECOM(RES,X) ; Return FHIR ContactPoint / Telecom Specs ; Input: RES passed by reference will be returned with telecom data ; X = address data in format [system^value^use^rank^period(start^end)] I $P(X,U,1)]"" S RES("system")=$P(X,U,1) ;phone,fax,email,pager,url,sms,other I $P(X,U,2)]"" S RES("value")=$P(X,U,2) ;actual contact details (phone#) I $P(X,U,3)]"" S RES("use")=$P(X,U,3) ;home,work,temp,old,mobile - purpose of this contact point I $P(X,U,4)]"" S RES("rank")=$P(X,U,4) ;preferred order of use (1=highest) D PERIOD(.RES,$P(X,U,5)_U_$P(X,U,6)) Q ; IDENT(RES,X) ; Return FHIR Identifier Specs ; Input: RES passed by reference will be returned with identifier data ; X = Identifier data in format [use^type^system^value^period(start^end)^assigner] I $P(X,U,1)]"" S RES("use")=$P(X,U,1) I $P(X,U,2)]"" S RES("type")=$P(X,U,2) I $P(X,U,3)]"" S RES("system")=$P(X,U,3) I $P(X,U,4)]"" S RES("value")=$P(X,U,4) D PERIOD(.RES,$P(X,U,5)_U_$P(X,U,6)) I $P(X,U,7)]"" S RES("assigner")=$P(X,U,7) Q ; NAME(RES,X) ; Return FHIR Name Specs ; Input: RES passed by reference will be returned with name data ; X = Name in standard format [use^FAMILY,GIVEN MIDDLE SUFFIX^period(start^end)] N NAME S NAME=$P(X,U,2) D NAMECOMP^XLFNAME(.NAME) I $P(X,U,1)]"" S RES("use")=$P(X,U,1) ;usual,official,temp,nickname,anonymous,old,maiden I $P(X,U,2)]"" S RES("text")=$S($P(X,U,2)]"":$P(X,U,2),1:"") I NAME("FAMILY")]"" S RES("family")=NAME("FAMILY") I NAME("GIVEN")]"" S RES("given",1,"first")=NAME("GIVEN") I NAME("MIDDLE")]"" S RES("given",2,"middle")=NAME("MIDDLE") I $G(NAME("PREFIX"))]"" S RES("prefix")=NAME("PREFIX") I $G(NAME("SUFFIX"))]"" S RES("suffix")=NAME("SUFFIX") D PERIOD(.RES,$P(X,U,3)_U_$P(X,U,4)) Q ; PERIOD(RES,X) ; Return FHIR Period Specs ; Input: RES passed by reference will be returned with start and end period data ; X = Name in standard format [startDate^endDate] I $P(X,U,1)]"" S RES("period","start")=$$FHIRDTTM($P(X,U,1)) I $P(X,U,2)]"" S RES("period","end")=$$FHIRDTTM($P(X,U,2)) Q ; CODE(RES,X) ; Return FHIR CodableConcept Specs ; Input: RES passed by reference will be returned with code data ; X = Name in standard format [coding^text] I $P(X,U,1)]"" S RES("coding")=$P(X,U,1) I $P(X,U,2)]"" S RES("text")=$P(X,U,2) Q ; PROVIDER(RES,PRV,FLD) ; Return Provider Specs ; Input: RES passed by reference will be returned with address data ; PRV = Provider IEN ; FLD = Field name associated with Provider (i.e. "attending" or "pc") N X Q:'+PRV S X=$$PROVSPC(+PRV) S RES(FLD_"Name")=$P(^VA(200,+PRV,0),U) S RES(FLD_"Code")=+PRV I $P(X,U,5)]"" S RES(FLD_"TaxonomyCode")=$P(X,U,5) I $P(X,U,6)]"" S RES(FLD_"Type")=$P(X,U,6) I $P(X,U,7)]"" S RES(FLD_"Classification")=$P(X,U,7) I $P(X,U,8)]"" S RES(FLD_"Specialization")=$P(X,U,8) I $P(X,U,9)]"" S RES(FLD_"Service")=$P(X,U,9) I $P(X,U,1)]"" S RES(FLD_"OfficePhone")=$P(X,U,1) I $P(X,U,2)]"" S RES(FLD_"AnalogPager")=$P(X,U,2) I $P(X,U,3)]"" S RES(FLD_"Fax")=$P(X,U,3) I $P(X,U,4)]"" S RES(FLD_"Email")=$P(X,U,4) Q ; PROVSPC(NP) ; -- Return contact & specialty info for provider NP ; save strings in ^TMP("DVPD",$J,NP) for efficiency N X,Y,I,CLS,PAT,X13,X15 S NP=+$G(NP) ;protect I for calling routine S RES=$G(^TMP("DVPD",$J,NP)) I $L(RES) Q RES S X13=$G(^VA(200,NP,.13)),X15=$G(^(.15)) S RES=$P(X13,U,2)_U_$P(X13,U,7)_U_$P(X13,U,6)_U_$P(X15,U)_U S X=$$TAXIND^XUSTAX(NP) I $P(X,U,2) D ;= X12 code ^ #8932.1 ien . S CLS=$G(^USC(8932.1,$P(X,U,2),0)) Q:CLS="" . S RES=RES_$P(X,U)_U_$P(CLS,U,1,3) ;X12^type^class^specialization S $P(RES,U,9)=$$GET1^DIQ(200,NP_",",29) S ^TMP("DVPD",$J,NP)=RES Q RES ; FORMAT(X) ; -- enforce (xxx)xxx-xxxx phone format S X=$G(X) I X?1"("3N1")"3N1"-"4N.E Q X N P,N,I,Y S P="" F I=1:1:$L(X) S N=$E(X,I) I N=+N S P=P_N S:$L(P)<10 P=$E("0000000000",1,10-$L(P))_P S Y=$S(P:"("_$E(P,1,3)_")"_$E(P,4,6)_"-"_$E(P,7,10),1:"") Q Y ; SETRES(TYPE,ID,FLD,VALUE) ; Set a node in the TARGET results array with a value Q:VALUE="" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,FLD)=VALUE Q ; SIG2FHIR(SIG,DOSAGE) ;Converts a SIG instruction to a FHIR Timing structure. S SIG=$$TRIM^XLFSTR(SIG) Q:SIG="" N TIM,REP S TIM="timing",REP="repeat" S DOSAGE(TIM,"code")=SIG,DOSAGE("asNeededBoolean")="false" I $F(SIG,"PRN") S DOSAGE("asNeededBoolean")="true",SIG=$E(SIG,1,$F(SIG,"PRN")-5) N LSIG S LSIG=$E(SIG,1,2) I (LSIG="MO")!(LSIG="TU")!(LSIG="WE")!(LSIG="TH")!(LSIG="FR")!(LSIG="SA")!(LSIG="SU") G DOW ;scheduler I SIG="BID" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=2,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="TID" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QID" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QD" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QOD" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=48,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="HS" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="PRN" S DOSAGE("asNeededBoolean")="true" G SIGQUIT I SIG="AC" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="AC" G SIGQUIT I SIG="PC" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="PC" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q4H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q6H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=6,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q8H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=8,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q12H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=12,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QAM" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="WAKE" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QPM" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="WM" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="C" G SIGQUIT I SIG="F10" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=10,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="TIDPC" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="PC" G SIGQUIT I SIG="TIDHS" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="1HS" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="2HS" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QH" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q2H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=2,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QW" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="wk" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QAMHS" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=2,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="WAKE",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",2)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QIDHS" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=5,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q3H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="TIDAC" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="AC" G SIGQUIT I SIG="BIDAP" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=2,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="WAKE",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",2)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q23" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=150,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="min" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q24" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=2,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodMax")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q46" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodMax")=6,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q68" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=6,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodMax")=8,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="23D" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=36,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="34D" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=84,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QIDPC" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="PC",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",2)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QIDAC" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="AC",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",2)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="2QID" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=2,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q24H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q12H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=12,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q14D" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=14,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q24H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=24,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q2H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=2,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q2WEEK" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=2,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="wk" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q3H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q48H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=48,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q4H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q4WEEK" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="wk" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q5D" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=4,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q5H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=5,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q6H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=6,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q6H-AC" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=6,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="AC" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q72H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=72,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="Q8H" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=8,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="h" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QAM" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="WAKE" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QAMINSULIN" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QDAY" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QDAY-DIG" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QDAY-WART" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QHS" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QID" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QM" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QOD" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QPM" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"when",1)="HS" G SIGQUIT I SIG="QWD" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=5,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="wk",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",1)="mon",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",2)="tue",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",3)="wed",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",4)="thu",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",5)="fri" G SIGQUIT I SIG="WEEKLY" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="wk" G SIGQUIT I SIG="3ID" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="3XW" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="w" G SIGQUIT I SIG="5XD" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=5,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" G SIGQUIT I SIG="MO+TU+WE" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="wk",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",1)="mon",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",2)="tue",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",3)="wed" G SIGQUIT I SIG="MO+WE+FR" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=3,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="wk",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",1)="mon",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",2)="wed",DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",3)="fri" G SIGQUIT G SIGQUIT DOW ; N TIME,DAYS,RET,IX S DAYS=SIG,TIME="" I $F(SIG,"@") S TIME=$E(SIG,$F(SIG,"@"),999),DAYS=$E(SIG,1,$F(SIG,"@")-2) F IX=1:1:10 S RET=$P(DAYS,"-",IX) Q:RET="" D . I RET="MO" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",IX)="mon" . I RET="TU" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",IX)="tue" . I RET="WE" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",IX)="wed" . I RET="TH" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",IX)="thu" . I RET="FR" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",IX)="fri" . I RET="SA" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",IX)="sat" . I RET="SU" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"dayOfWeek",IX)="sun" I TIME'="" D .F IX=1:1:10 S RET=$P(TIME,"-",IX) Q:RET="" D .. S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"timeOfDay",IX)=$E(RET,1,2)_":"_$E(RET,3,4) . S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=IX-1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="d" I TIME="" S DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"frequency")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"period")=1,DOSAGE(TIM,REP,"periodUnit")="wk" SIGQUIT ; Q ; FHIRPAT(RES,ICN) ; returns a FHIR patient identification structure N XX S XX="official^MR^MVI^"_ICN_"^^^Department of Veterans Affairs" D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.DVPID,XX) M RES("identifier")=DVPID N DISP D STDNAME^XLFNAME($P(^DPT(DFN,0),U),"",.DISP) S RES("display")=DISP Q ; FHIRPRC(RES,IEN) ;returns a FHIR practitioner identification structure N XX S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("practitioner","",IEN) N ID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.ID,XX) M RES("identifier")=ID S RES("display")=$P(^VA(200,IEN,0),U) Q ; FHIRLOC(RES,IEN) ;returns a FHIR locationt identification structure N XX S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("location","",IEN) N ID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.ID,XX) M RES("identifier")=ID S RES("display")=$P(^SC(IEN,0),U) Q ; FHIRORG(RES,IEN) ;returns a FHIR organization identification structure N XX S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("organization","",IEN) N ID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.ID,XX) M RES("identifier")=ID S RES("display")=$P(^DIC(4,IEN,0),U) Q ; FHIRORD(RES,IEN) ;returns a FHIR order identification structure N XX S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("order","",IEN) N ID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.ID,XX) M RES("identifier")=ID Q ; FHIRVS(RES,ICN,IEN) ;returns a FHIR order identification structure N XX S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("vital-signs","",ICN,IEN) N ID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.ID,XX) M RES("identifier")=ID Q ; FHIRMED(RES,VAL,TY,TTY) ;returns a FHIR order identification structure TY: "V"=VUID "R"=RXNORM S RES("code")=$S(TY="V":$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("medication","",VAL),1:VAL),RES("system")=$S(TY="V":"http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/vuid",TY="R":"http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm") I $G(TTY)'="" S RES("termType")=TTY Q ; SITECHK(VUID,CALLER) ; ; checks the siteId of a VUID against the current siteId and returns 1 if equals or 0 if different I $P($G(VUID),":",4)'=$P($$SITE^VASITE,U) D Q 0 . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"fatal","value","MSG_ID_INVALID","The siteId does NOT match the current VistA siteId",CALLER) Q 1 ; FHIRQTY(RES,X) ; Creates a quantity node ; X=value^unit^system^code S RES("value")=$P(X,U),RES("unit")=$P(X,U,2),RES("system")=$P(X,U,3),RES("code")=$P(X,U,4) Q
